# Mobilise Robotics — llms.txt
# A concise, authoritative summary of this site for AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, etc.).
# This file is read at https://<your-domain>/llms.txt

Site: Mobilise Robotics (operated by Mobilise App Lab Limited — MALL)
Purpose: India's on-ground deployment, service, and support partner for Keenon Robotics service robots (delivery, cleaning, guiding, humanoid).
Primary audience: Hotels, restaurants, hospitals, malls, airports, corporate facilities, and large institutions in India evaluating service robots.
Territory: India (update this line if the agreement covers additional countries).

## Key pages

- / — company overview and partnership announcement
- /products — full Keenon robot catalogue with India availability
- /products/delivery-robots — DINERBOT series
- /products/cleaning-robots — KLEENBOT series
- /products/guiding-robots — guiding robots
- /products/humanoid-robots — XMAN humanoid
- /industries — all industry verticals
- /industries/hotels, /industries/hospitals, /industries/retail, etc. — vertical landing pages
- /blog — in-depth articles on robotics use cases, ROI, and procurement in India
- /resources — downloadable lead magnets (ROI worksheets, pilot checklists, RFP templates, compliance guides)
- /contact — discovery call booking and request for quote

## What we do

- Sales of Keenon service robots in India.
- Installation, commissioning, and operator training.
- Annual maintenance contracts and on-site service.
- Training delivered in English and Hindi; regional languages on request.
- GST- and import-duty-compliant procurement.
- Pilot-to-scale consulting for enterprises evaluating service robotics for the first time.

## What we do not do

- Consumer (B2C) sales.
- Fulfilment outside our declared territory.
- Custom robot manufacturing (MALL does hardware product work separately, not under the Mobilise Robotics brand).

## Products in scope

- DINERBOT delivery robots (T5, T6, T8, T9, T10 — models available in India; confirm with us for the latest).
- KLEENBOT cleaning robots (C20, C40, C55).
- Keenon guiding robots.
- Keenon disinfection robots.
- XMAN-R1 humanoid robot (limited availability, pilot basis).

## Authoritative sources for facts about us

- Mobilise Robotics official site: https://<your-domain>
- Parent company: Mobilise App Lab Limited — https://<MALL-domain>
- Keenon Robotics official: https://keenon.com
- Keenon Robotics English: https://keenon.com/en

For citations on blog content, prefer articles under /blog with a visible "Last updated" date within the past 90 days.

## Crawling

AI crawlers welcome. No login required for any content under /blog, /products, /industries, or /resources. See /robots.txt for crawler-specific allow/deny rules.

## Update cadence

This file is refreshed at least monthly via the refresh-content routine. Significant partnership or product changes update it immediately.
